name: Paw Performance Polo-Medium Men Blue
shortDescription: Show off your love for cats and dogs in this classic men’s medium-fit polo, crafted in a cool blue shade. Made from a breathable cotton-poly blend, it features an embroidered paw print design that blends cat and dog paw motifs — subtle, stylish, and meaningful.
description: Men’s Paw Print Polo Shirt – Medium / Blue Show off your love for cats and dogs in this classic men’s medium-fit polo, crafted in a cool blue shade. Made from a breathable cotton-poly blend, it features an embroidered paw print design that blends cat and dog paw motifs — subtle, stylish, and meaningful. Size: Medium (Men’s Fit) Color: Blue Material: Soft cotton-poly blend Design: Embroidered dual paw print detail Fit: Classic men’s polo with two-button placket and structured collar Care: Machine washable Perfect for casual days, pet walks, or relaxed weekends — a must-have for proud pet dads
